description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a whimsical, fantasy creature with a rounded body, short legs, and a pair of large, outstretched wings. The toy is primarily a soft, pale blue color with subtle pink accents on the cheeks, wing tips, and tail. Its head features two small, upright ears and a gentle, rounded snout, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. The wings are broad and slightly curved, adding a sense of motion and playfulness to the design. The surface appears plush and velvety, suggesting a soft and huggable texture. There are no visible clothing items or accessories, and the toy's features are simple and stylized, with minimal facial details.
description: A soft, pale blue fantasy creature stuffed toy with large wings, upright ears, and pink accents, featuring a plush, huggable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the creature's face, upright ears, and both wings fully extended outward, with pink blush on the cheeks.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the profile of the head, the curvature of the wings, and the curled tail, with one ear and wing more prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, both wings, and the tail, emphasizing the symmetry and plush texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the other profile of the head, wing, and tail, with similar features visible.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: fantasy winged creature with upright ears and a curled tail
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small, closed eyes and a rounded snout, giving a calm and friendly appearance. There are no visible eyebrows or mouth details.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is posed with its wings outstretched to the sides, head facing forward, and tail curled upward. Its body is upright and symmetrical, with limbs tucked beneath.
